source: bgd-labs/aave-address-book (AaveV3Ethereum.sol, GovernanceV3Ethereum.sol, AaveSafetyModule.sol, GhoEthereum.sol, UmbrellaEthereum.sol) + Etherscan-verified ABIs
note: Aave on Ethereum mainnet (chainId 1) — representative-chain onboarding. SCOPE: lending Pool + WETHGateway + variable-debt credit delegation + AAVE governance-power delegation (governance domain, axis-1). DEFER (user-facing, usage-share measured P2): GHO/GSM/SGHO, stkAAVE/stkGHO/Umbrella safety-module staking, Governance proposal/voting, aAAVE/stkAAVE delegation (same surface as AAVE; AAVE dominant). L2 deployments = multichain expansion deferred (separate framework). EXCLUDE = infra/admin/keeper/standard-ERC20.

contracts.name: Pool (v3.4 proxy)
contracts.reason: primary lending surface: supply/withdraw/borrow/repay/setUserEMode/collateral/multicall

contracts.name: WrappedTokenGatewayV3 (WETHGateway)
contracts.reason: ETH-native supply/borrow/repay/withdraw periphery

contracts.name: AAVE token (AaveTokenV3, proxy)
contracts.reason: governance-power delegation surface (delegate/metaDelegate) — governance domain axis-1; standard ERC-20 via erc20 adapter

contracts.name: variableDebtToken DAI
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface (approveDelegation/delegationWithSig/renounceDelegation)

contracts.name: variableDebtToken LINK
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface

contracts.name: variableDebtToken USDC
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface

contracts.name: variableDebtToken USDT
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface

contracts.name: variableDebtToken WBTC
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface

contracts.name: variableDebtToken wstETH
contracts.reason: credit-delegation permission surface

contracts.name: PoolAddressesProvider
contracts.reason: infra: address registry, not a user pre-sign target

contracts.name: PoolConfigurator
contracts.reason: governance/admin: reserve/risk configuration

contracts.name: ACLManager
contracts.reason: admin: role management

contracts.name: AaveOracle
contracts.reason: read-only price infra

contracts.name: Collector
contracts.reason: treasury/admin

contracts.name: GHO token
contracts.reason: no protocol-specific contract surface to decode: transfer/approve/permit = standard ERC-20 (erc20 standard adapter); mint/burn/addFacilitator = facilitator-gated (non-EOA). GHO is covered as a registered TOKEN (tokens/1/0x40d16f…, check:tokens) so amounts are legible across Pool-borrow / GSM swap / stkGHO stake — not as a cover contract.

contracts.name: GSM USDC
contracts.reason: user GSM swap surface: buyAsset/sellAsset (GHO↔USDC fixed-price). snapshot gsm-usdc-mainnet (impl 0x320be97b…); maps to amm::GsmSwap.

contracts.name: GSM USDT
contracts.reason: user GSM swap surface: buyAsset/sellAsset (GHO↔USDT fixed-price). snapshot gsm-usdt-mainnet (impl 0x31fe806e…); maps to amm::GsmSwap.

contracts.name: SGHO (Savings GHO, ERC4626)
contracts.reason: deferred user-facing surface (ERC4626 deposit/redeem); usage-share P2, follow-up

contracts.name: GHO FlashMinter
contracts.reason: keeper/integrator flash-mint facilitator; receiver is a contract, not EOA pre-sign

contracts.name: stkAAVE (StakedAaveV3)
contracts.reason: user safety-module surface: stake/cooldown/redeem/claimRewards (→ staking domain) + governance delegate/delegateByType (→ airdrop::Delegate). snapshot stkaave-mainnet (impl 0x0fe58fe1…).

contracts.name: stkGHO (StakedGho)
contracts.reason: user safety-module surface: stake/cooldown/redeem/claimRewards (→ staking domain); no governance delegation (GHO non-gov). snapshot stkgho-mainnet (impl 0x50f9d4e2…).

contracts.name: stkABPT
contracts.reason: deferred legacy Balancer-pool staking; usage-share P2, follow-up

contracts.name: Umbrella (safety module controller)
contracts.reason: deferred user-facing surface (new safety-module deposit/cooldown); usage-share P2, follow-up

contracts.name: Umbrella BatchHelper
contracts.reason: deferred user-facing batch helper; usage-share P2, follow-up

contracts.name: aAAVE (AAVE aToken)
contracts.reason: governance-power delegation surface (delegate/delegateByType on-chain); SCOPE ORACLE: aAAVE delegate (2.5%) is the dominant delegate surface vs AAVE (0%). standard aToken ERC-20 via erc20 adapter; off-chain metaDelegate (low) deferred.

contracts.name: Governance V3 (proxy)
contracts.reason: deferred user-facing surface (createProposal/cancelProposal/updateRepresentativesForChain); usage-share P2, follow-up. Crank fns (activateVoting/executeProposal/redeemCancellationFee) are permissionless, no pre-sign user intent

contracts.name: VotingMachine
contracts.reason: deferred user-facing surface (submitVote/submitVoteBySignature); usage-share P2, follow-up. Vote weight is a storage-proof tuple, opaque to static decode

contracts.name: PayloadsController
contracts.reason: keeper/admin: executePayload is a permissionless crank; cancelPayload is guardian-only

contracts.name: VotingPortal ETH_ETH
contracts.reason: infra: cross-chain voting plumbing, appears as createProposal arg, never a user to:

contracts.name: Executor LVL_1
contracts.reason: infra: only callable by PayloadsController

contracts.name: Executor LVL_2
contracts.reason: infra: only callable by PayloadsController

contracts.name: CrossChainController
contracts.reason: infra: relayer plumbing, not wallet-facing

contracts.name: GovernancePowerStrategy
contracts.reason: read-only view strategy

contracts.name: META_DELEGATE_HELPER
contracts.reason: deferred: batched metaDelegate helper across gov tokens; usage-share P2, follow-up

contracts.name: ParaSwapRepayAdapter
contracts.reason: integrator adapter (ParaSwap-backed), not a core Aave pre-sign target

contracts.name: ParaSwapLiquiditySwapAdapter
contracts.reason: integrator adapter (ParaSwap-backed)

contracts.name: ParaSwapWithdrawSwapAdapter
contracts.reason: integrator adapter (ParaSwap-backed)
